scripts.pretest: esbuild test/engine.test.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=test/engine.build.mjs && esbuild test/rogue.test.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=test/rogue.build.mjs && esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js
scripts.test: node test/engine.build.mjs && node test/rogue.build.mjs && node test/dom.smoke.cjs
